body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
This PR follows on a previous PR which added a new constructor for the EnergyHydrology model.  This implements a similar constructor for the snow model. In an experiment, we now use these new constructors to make soil and snow model, and then use the *default* SnowSoilModel constructor. We can also remove the outer constructor.
title: Snow model constructor, Soil/snow integrated models
